body: Completed lifecycle parity gate. Added adapter-driven CLI/MCP/dashboard parity tests for canonical task/issue/claim JSON, event streams, timestamp invariants, duplicates, invalid/claim-dependent transitions, unmet dependencies, recovery diagnostics, missing ledgers, reopen, issue close, and no direct surface writes. Parity exposed a shared mutation journal ID collision for same-kind mutations in one second; fixed with unique mutation stamps and regression coverage. Verification: 201 tests pass, typecheck/Biome clean, binary rebuilt, validate 0 errors. No SyntaxError: Unexpected end of input.
